scripts.build:packages: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:types && npm run build:prisma && npm run build:utils && npm run build:redis && npm run build:logger && npm run build:schemas && npm run build:queue
scripts.setup: npm run setup:proxy && npm run setup:db && npm run setup:redis && npm run setup:signoz
scripts.openapi:generate: npm run openapi:generate-api && npm run openapi:generate-client && npm run format:contracts && npm run build:packages
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && npm run clean:build
scripts.docker:create-network: docker network inspect poveroh_network || docker network create poveroh_network
scripts.docker-dev:db: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans db
scripts.docker-dev:api: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans api
scripts.docker-dev:app: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans app
scripts.docker-dev:redis: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans redis
scripts.docker-dev:studio: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans studio
scripts.docker-dev:proxy: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans proxy
scripts.docker-dev:signoz: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml --profile signoz up -d --remove-orphans signoz-init-clickhouse signoz-zookeeper clickhouse signoz signoz-otel-collector signoz-migrator
scripts.docker-dev:signoz:down: cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml stop signoz-init-clickhouse signoz-zookeeper clickhouse signoz signoz-otel-collector signoz-migrator
scripts.docker-dev: npm run docker:create-network && cd ./docker && docker compose --env-file ../.env -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans db api app redis proxy && node ../scripts/setup/signoz.js
